text:
Created attachment 210957
patch to update the port

- update 2.002 --> 2.003
Changes: http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/BDFOY/Test-Prereq-2.003/Changes

- "portlint -AC" gives just non-relevant warnings.

- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p1 amd64
poudriere 3.3.3
perl 5.30.1
pkg 1.12.0
ssl=base

- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say PASS.
